name: Find a book with name in different font cases in Palace
fullName: Search libraries and books: Find a book with name in different font cases in Palace

steps.name: Then  Add library screen is opened
When  Add library "Palace Bookshelf" on Add library screen
And  Enter word EL GATO NEGRO and save as 'info' on catalog books screen
Then  The first book has 'info' bookName on catalog books screen

labels.name: story
labels.value: Find a book with name in different font cases in Palace
